title: ConnectionStatus::Disconnected variant is never sent
description: The Disconnected variant is defined in event.rs and has a Display impl, but no code path in client_task.rs ever sends AppEvent::StatusChanged(ConnectionStatus::Disconnected). The background task either returns silently (on auth failure or tx drop) or transitions between Connecting/Connected/Reconnecting. This is dead code that will confuse contributors who expect it to appear in the UI when the connection is permanently lost. The dead_code lint may or may not fire depending on whether the variant is matched elsewhere. — Maintenance consequence: contributor who adds a new disconnect path may send Disconnected only to find the UI still shows Connecting because the background task exited without sending the variant.
